description: User examines the 'Travel dates' calendar, hovering over various dates in March 2026 while deciding on a flight range.
page_title: Flight Centre - Your centre for cruises.
frame_description: The user is browsing the calendar in the travel dates modal.

description: User selects March 20 and March 22 as travel dates, which updates the selection from the previous February date.
page_title: Flight Centre - Your centre for cruises.
frame_description: The calendar selection updates to March 20-22 and the price estimate at the bottom changes.

description: User hovers over the 'Done' button in the travel dates modal after finalizing the date selection.
page_title: Flight Centre - Your centre for cruises.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the 'Done' button at the bottom right of the modal.
